title: eriogonum ovalifolium var. eximium
intro: Eriogonum ovalifolium var. eximium, commonly known as eximious buckwheat sage or eximious buckwheat sages, is a flowering plant species in the buckwheat family, Polygonaceae. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Eriogonum ovalifolium var. eximium include its ability to soothe wounds, reduce fever, and relieve digestive issues. Herbal preparations of this plant include infusions, decoctions, and salves, which can be used to promote wound healing and alleviate various health concerns.
